rulings.Case Title: IN RE: QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Claim Of Surplus Proceeds Of Trustee'S Sale
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 15, 2014, line 1. CLAIMANTs HERMAN LEE and KATHERINE YUN's Motion For Claim Of Surplus Proceeds Of Trustee's Sale GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA JANECEK VS. MIKE TAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash The Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Records To Kaiser Hospital - San Francisco
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 15, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANTs MIKE TAM and PING MAY's Motion To Quash The Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Records To Kaiser Hospital - San Francisco Moot in light of ruling on the companion motion. As Defendant is ordered to appear at deposition, there is no need for the medical records. Sanctions granted against defendants and her counsel in the amount of $2,335 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant and her counsel refused to appear at deposition asserting inability to testify and refused to cooperative with less intrusive means of discovery designed to corroborate defendant's claim of inability to testify. See Larry Tam Deposition and Mike Tam Deposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA JANECEK VS. MIKE TAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Stay The Deposition Of Ping May And For A Protective Order To Prevent The Taking Of The Deposition Of Ping May
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 15, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANTs MIKE TAM and PING MAY's Motion To Stay The Deposition Of Ping May And For A Protective Order To Prevent The Taking Of The Deposition Of Ping May DENIED. Moving party again failed to show with competent evidence defendant's inability to testify, lack of knowledge, or undue burden. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,335 to be paid by defendant and her counsel within 5 days of notice of entry order. Defendant shall appear for deposition on a date set by Plaintiff no later than September 19, 2014. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAIRE DWAN VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 15, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANTs SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC., NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC and REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend DENIED. No order sustaining the demurrer was ever filed and no notice of entry of such order was served on plaintiff. CCP 472b, CRC 3.1320, CCP 1013. = (501/REQ)
